[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up image shows a white background with large black text reading “hai” in the upper left portion of the frame.

The main visual focus is the partial word “hai” shown in bold, black, lowercase letters.

The setting appears to be a plain, solid white background with no other visible objects, scenery, or context.

The letters are thick and high-contrast, with the text positioned near the top-left corner; the rest of the image is blank white space. The camera angle and lighting are not applicable beyond the flat presentation of the text.

hai

Practical Summary:
The image is a simple typographic graphic displaying the word “hai.” No other elements or text are visible.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
